source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/02_CYAN/1. DHF/16. Manual/[GT series] User Manual_EN (Retrofit).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for H&Abyz GT1717C/GT1717CP digital flat panel X-ray detectors, model HnX-R1.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use this manual to set up the GT1717/GT1717CP detector and understand its functions, safety warnings, operation, maintenance, regulatory compliance, labeling, warranty, and revision history.
keyPoints: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography equipment and stores and transmits the images.
The detector is a medical device and cannot be used for mammography.
Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
This equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.
Disposal in the EU and EEA must follow WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and national law.
Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.evidence: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is a device that converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography (DR) equipment and stores and transmits the images. It also includes software.

concepts.name: Patient group
concepts.evidence: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is used to examine patients with, or suspected of having, musculoskeletal injuries and respiratory diseases.

concepts.name: Contra-indication
concepts.evidence: This detector cannot be used for mammography.

concepts.name: Electrical safety classification
concepts.evidence: Type of protection against electric shock: Class I ME Equipment Degree of protection against electric shock: N/A (No applied part)

concepts.name: EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: This equipment complies with the IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.

concepts.name: WEEE disposal
concepts.evidence: This product is not to be disposed with your household waste, according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

concepts.name: Product lifetime
concepts.evidence: Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: The manual explains how to use GT1717/GT1717CP detector models made by H&Abyz.
evidence.evidenceText: This user manual explains how to use the GT1717/GT1717CP detector models made by H&abyz.

evidence.claim: The product model name is HnX-R1 and the reference numbers are GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: Model name: HnX-R1 Ref no. GT1717C, GT1717CP

evidence.claim: The product is a digital flat panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector

evidence.claim: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography equipment and stores and transmits the images.
evidence.evidenceText: The GT1717C/GT1717CP Detector is a device that converts medical images into digital format using digital radiography (DR) equipment and stores and transmits the images.

evidence.claim: The detector cannot be used for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: This detector cannot be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: Only a physician or legally certified operator should use the product.
evidence.evidenceText: Only a physician or a legally certified operator should use this product.

evidence.claim: The product has Class I ME Equipment protection against electric shock and no applied part.
evidence.evidenceText: Type of protection against electric shock: Class I ME Equipment Degree of protection against electric shock: N/A (No applied part)

evidence.claim: The detector uses a CsI scintillator.
Accessory equipment connected to analog and digital interfaces must comply with applicable IEC standards and combinations must meet IEC 60601-1 system requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: Accessory equipment connected to the analog and digital interfaces must comply with applicable IEC standards, and all equipment combinations must meet IEC 60601-1 system requirements.

evidence.claim: The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.
evidence.evidenceText: This equipment complies with the IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standard for medical devices.

evidence.claim: The detector has RF emissions compliance of CISPR 11 Group 1 and Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Emissions CISPR 11 Group 1 ... RF Emissions CISPR 11 Class A

evidence.claim: Harmonics emissions are IEC 61000-3-2 Class A and voltage fluctuations/flicker emissions comply with IEC 61000-3-3.
evidence.evidenceText: Harmonics Emissions IEC 61000-3-2 Class A Voltage fluctuations/flicker emissions IEC 61000-3-3 Complies

evidence.claim: In the EU and EEA, the product must not be disposed with household waste under the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and national law.
evidence.evidenceText: European Union (and EEA*) only This symbol indicates that this product is not to be disposed with your household waste, according to the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EC) and your national law.

evidence.claim: The product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: Product life is approximately 5 years under proper regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: Periodic inspection should be performed at least once a year.
evidence.evidenceText: To ensure the safety of patients, users, and third parties, and to maintain equipment performance and reliability, perform a periodic inspection at least once a year.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is general; the source is a manufacturer user manual, not an authority-issued regulatory document.
Document title is inferred from source path and manual text because no formal cover-page title is present in the extracted source text.
The text alternates between GT1717/GT1717CP and GT1717C/GT1717CP, so model naming should be verified against the original document.
Some EMC sections refer to this product as a Wireless Detector even though the manual describes wired detector connection modes.
